name: Ahmed Abdelrahman
summary: Self-taught full-stack developer with 2+ years of experience building production applications using TypeScript, React, and Node.js. Designed and deployed distributed systems processing 1M+ events/hour on AWS, and built full-stack platforms from the ground up. Eager to write clean, scalable code and grow as part of a collaborative engineering team.

experience.title: Full-Stack Engineer (Adobe Extensions)
bullets: Built and shipped production Adobe After Effects & Premiere Pro extensions, including Vanish BG — a real-time AI background removal tool available at aescripts.com, running ML inference inside a sandboxed CEP environment.
Designed a Node.js sidecar process architecture to handle AI inference outside Adobe's restricted CEP sandbox, using local HTTP for IPC and streaming results back to the React UI in real time.
Built a TTS Premiere Pro extension using Node.js with local ONNX model inference, designing the full audio pipeline from text input to rendered timeline clip.
Collaborated asynchronously with designers and stakeholders, shipping production-ready tools using agile workflows.

experience.title: Full-Stack Engineer
bullets: Built a full-stack tourism booking platform using Next.js, TypeScript, and Node.js with TypeORM for type-safe PostgreSQL access.
Applied PostgreSQL indexing strategies and EXPLAIN ANALYZE to achieve sub-100ms API response times under concurrent load.
Integrated Paymob payment gateway with idempotent transaction handling and webhook verification, reducing checkout friction by 40%.
Improved SEO and Core Web Vitals to 95+ Lighthouse score using Next.js SSR, image optimization, and lazy loading.

items: AWS (ECS Fargate, ECR, RDS, ElastiCache, Lambda, SSM)

projects.name: RootCluster — AI-Powered Log Analysis Platform
projects.techStack: TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS, Docker, BullMQ
highlights: Designed and deployed a distributed log ingestion pipeline on AWS ECS Fargate processing 1M+ events/hour with sub-second latency.
Reduced ONNX embedding time from 20+ minutes to under 1 minute via batch processing, Redis caching, and worker autoscaling.
Designed an event-driven pipeline — normalize, embed, cluster, merge, root cause — with retries, exponential backoff, DLQs, and idempotent processing.
Set up full CI/CD with GitHub Actions OIDC, ECR, SSM Parameter Store, RDS PostgreSQL, and ElastiCache.
Applied PostgreSQL internals (indexing, MVCC, isolation levels) to build a high-throughput write pipeline avoiding lock contention.

projects.name: Medical CRM — AI-Enhanced Prescription Platform
highlights: Built a full-stack CRM handling diagnoses, prescriptions, and patient records with React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL.
Implemented JWT auth with access/refresh token rotation and RBAC across three permission levels.
Designed drug interaction validation across 500+ medications using graph-based PostgreSQL lookup.
Optimized dashboard queries for 10K+ monthly records using composite indexes and window functions.
